name: autogen
description: A programming framework for agentic AI PyPI: autogen-agentchat
desc_en: Microsoft's open-source framework for building multi-agent AI applications.
desc_zh: 微軟開源的多代理 AI 應用程式開發框架，支援複雜任務自動化。

name: langchain
desc_en: Framework for building LLM-powered context-aware reasoning applications.
desc_zh: 打造具備上下文感知能力的 LLM 推理應用程式開發框架。

name: ollama
description: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, DeepSeek-R1, Phi-4, Gemma 3, and other large language models.
desc_en: Run Llama, Phi-4, Gemma and other large language models locally with one command.
desc_zh: 一行指令在本地端執行 Llama、Phi-4、Gemma 等大型語言模型。

name: open-webui
description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)
desc_en: User-friendly web interface for running local LLMs including Ollama and OpenAI API.
desc_zh: 友善的本地 LLM 網頁介面，支援 Ollama 與 OpenAI API。

name: vite
description: Next generation frontend tooling. It's fast!
desc_en: Next-generation frontend build tool with instant HMR and lightning-fast performance.
desc_zh: 下一代前端建置工具，具備即時 HMR 與極速效能。

name: bun
description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
desc_en: All-in-one ultra-fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager.
desc_zh: 集執行環境、打包工具、測試執行器與套件管理於一體的極速 JavaScript 工具。

name: zed
description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor
desc_en: High-performance multiplayer code editor built in Rust with GPU-accelerated rendering.
desc_zh: 以 Rust 打造的高效能多人協作程式碼編輯器，支援 GPU 加速渲染。

name: uv
description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust
desc_en: Extremely fast Python package and project manager written in Rust, pip-compatible.
desc_zh: 以 Rust 撰寫的超快 Python 套件與專案管理工具，相容 pip。

name: superset
description: Apache Superset is a Data Visualization and Data Exploration Platform
desc_en: Apache's open-source data visualization and exploration platform with 40+ chart types.
desc_zh: Apache 開源資料視覺化與探索平台，支援 40 種以上圖表類型。

name: metabase
description: The simplest, fastest way to get business intelligence and analytics to everyone.
desc_en: Simplest and fastest way to get business intelligence and analytics to everyone.
desc_zh: 最簡單快速的企業智慧與分析工具，讓所有人都能輕鬆洞察資料。

name: duckdb
description: DuckDB is an analytical in-process SQL database management system
desc_en: Fast in-process analytical SQL database — runs queries on files without a server.
desc_zh: 快速的程序內嵌分析型 SQL 資料庫，無需伺服器即可查詢資料檔案。

name: nuclei
description: Nuclei is a fast, customizable vulnerability scanner powered by the global security community
desc_en: Fast customizable vulnerability scanner powered by the global security community.
desc_zh: 由全球資安社群驅動的快速可自訂漏洞掃描工具。

name: trivy
description: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more
desc_en: All-in-one security scanner for containers, Kubernetes, code, and cloud infrastructure.
desc_zh: 全方位資安掃描工具，涵蓋容器、Kubernetes、程式碼與雲端基礎設施。

name: ui
description: Beautifully designed components that you can copy and paste into your apps.
desc_en: Beautifully designed React components built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS.
desc_zh: 以 Radix UI 與 Tailwind CSS 打造的精美 React 元件庫，可直接複製使用。

name: excalidraw
description: Virtual whiteboard for sketching hand-drawn like diagrams
desc_en: Virtual whiteboard for collaborative sketching with a hand-drawn aesthetic.
desc_zh: 具備手繪風格的虛擬白板協作工具，適合快速繪製圖表與示意圖。
